sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check what changed after clicking on the black center of the top-right red cross.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after to see what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after['nodes']}

# Check what changed - look at the cross area
print("=== Top-right cross area (rows 9-12, cols 50-54) ===")
before_ascii = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after_ascii = last_transition.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(9, 13):
    b = before_ascii[i][50:54]
    a = after_ascii[i][50:54]
    diff = " <-- CHANGED" if b != a else ""
    print(f"Row {i}: before={b} after={a}{diff}")

# Check bottom-left cross area too
print("\n=== Bottom-left cross area (rows 50-54, cols 8-12) ===")
for i in range(50, 55):
    b = before_ascii[i][8:12]
    a = after_ascii[i][8:12]
    diff = " <-- CHANGED" if b != a else ""
    print(f"Row {i}: before={b} after={a}{diff}")

# Check green bar area
print("\n=== Green bar area (rows 9-12, cols 27-33) ===")
for i in range(9, 12):
    b = before_ascii[i][27:33]
    a = after_ascii[i][27:33]
    diff = " <-- CHANGED" if b != a else ""
    print(f"Row {i}: before={b} after={a}{diff}")

# Check yellow bar area
print("\n=== Yellow bar area (rows 33-36, cols 8-12) ===")
for i in range(33, 36):
    b = before_ascii[i][8:12]
    a = after_ascii[i][8:12]
    diff = " <-- CHANGED" if b != a else ""
    print(f"Row {i}: before={b} after={a}{diff}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Hmm, nothing seems to have changed visibly in those areas. But the result said `board_changed: true` and `total_cells_changed: 1`. Let me look more carefully at what changed.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find the exact cell that changed
before_ascii = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after_ascii = last_transition.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')

changed_cells = []
for r in range(len(before_ascii)):
    for c in range(len(before_ascii[r])):
        if before_ascii[r][c] != after_ascii[r][c]:
            changed_cells.append((r, c, before_ascii[r][c], after_ascii[r][c]))

print(f"Changed cells: {changed_cells}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
